issues.description: Missing action: 'place 1 card from your hand at the top or bottom of your deck' is not represented. Need to add SearchDeck or similar action to model deck placement.
PowerBoost target should be optional (up to 1). Current scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' does not indicate optionality. Should use 'optional:true' or equivalent.
Missing 'Once Per Turn' enforcement. The condition object lacks a once-per-turn restriction mechanism (typically handled by a flag or activation limit, not shown in current DSL).
